THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, GERDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEWMAN, CHRIS NEWMAN, VALARIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1544 POLK STREET #41 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL JUN-17-2003, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN ATTORNEY FEES AND COST. WRIT MAY ISSUE FORTHWITH. PERSONAL PRPTY. NOT REMOVED DEEMED ABANDONED. GENERAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS AND CIVIL CODE 1542 RELEASE. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGHT FOR FURTHER DETAIL. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
